item.title: Integration tests for credential probes — test against real API endpoints with test keys
item.intent: Credential health probes are tested with mocked fetch. If an API changes its auth error response, our probe will misinterpret it. Real probes against real APIs must be tested.
item.description: Live probe tests that run when test API keys are available. Ollama probe can always run locally.
steps: For each probe: if env var with test key is set, run real probe
Ollama probe can always run if Ollama is installed locally
Validate: probe returns valid:true for good keys, valid:false for bad keys
Skip gracefully when no test keys are available
acceptanceCriteria: Live probe tests run against real APIs when test credentials are available
Ollama probe runs against local Ollama when available
Tests skip gracefully when no credentials are provided
Existing mock-based unit tests remain unchanged
